parameters.query:
WITH target_batches AS (
  SELECT id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(periodo, created_at::date) DESC, created_at DESC) as rn
  FROM embaplan_upload_batch
  WHERE ($1::bigint IS NULL OR id <= $1::bigint)
  ORDER BY COALESCE(periodo, created_at::date) DESC, created_at DESC
  LIMIT 2
)
SELECT s.batch_id, tb.rn, s.loja, s.produto, s.anuncio_indice, s.titulo, s.status, s.saude, s.vendas, s.receita, s.lucro, s.investimento_ads, s.acos, s.ctr, s.conversao, s.roas, s.roi, s.margem_liquida, s.ticket_medio 
FROM embaplan_analysis_snapshot s
JOIN target_batches tb ON s.batch_id = tb.id;
